data.text: THIS GREY GIANT HAS NO PLANETS AND HAS LITHIUM. SO NAMED
BECAUSE IT IS A POINT ON MY JOURNEY TO 0, 0, INFINITY.. OR
AS FAR AS I CAN GET IN THAT DIRECTION. --EKA
TO MY SURPRISE, I FOUND THIS STAR ON MY WAY BACK AS I WAS DOING A QUICK
STAR SCAN WITH MY REMOTE TARGET CHOOSER. I STOPPED BY FOR SOME MORE
